summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright ADR ETF (AADR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims to outperform the international markets outside the US by holding ADRs with high relative strength. AADR was launched on Jul 20, 2010 and is issued by AdvisorShares.

holdings.infoBox: AADR is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group stock at 4.93%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 4.88%, China Yuchai International at 4.15%, Barclays at 4.12%, and Nokia Oyj at 3.44%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
